query: SELECT dr.*, a.nome as aluno_nome FROM disc_resultados dr LEFT JOIN alunos a ON dr.alunoId = a.id WHERE dr.scoreD = '100.00' AND dr.scoreI = '100.00' AND dr.scoreS = '100.00' AND dr.scoreC = '100.00'
